case_title: TOMMY PHAM VS. EILEEN TILLMAN ET AL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY PHAM, TOMMY AS TO DEFENDANT TILLMAN, EILEEN TILLMAN, DARYL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHAM, TOMMY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TILLMAN, EILEEN TILLMAN, DARYL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
